name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized financial records cause late tax filings. We provide a tax preparation assistant instead of manual record-keeping and tax filing.
problem_solved: Difficulty in organizing financial records and filing tax returns on time.
